title: Potosia zamororae
taxonomy: Potosia zamororae is classified within the family Cetoniidae, which is a group of beetles commonly known as metalmarks or tortoise beetles. This family is part of the larger order Coleoptera, which encompasses all beetles. The Cetoniidae family is further divided into several subfamilies, and Potosia zamororae is likely to be placed within one of these subfamilies. However, without more specific information, the exact subfamily classification of Potosia zamororae remains unclear. Further research would be needed to determine its exact classification within the family Cetoniidae.
